# Smart Home AI Brain - Issues & Project Board

## 🐛 Report Bugs

Found a bug? Please open an issue with:
- Description of the problem
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected behavior
- Screenshots (if applicable)
- Your environment (OS, Python version, etc.)

[Open Bug Report](https://github.com/nelsonelagunar/smart-home-ai-brain/issues/new?labels=bug&template=bug_report.md)

## ✨ Request Features

Have an idea? We'd love to hear it!

[Open Feature Request](https://github.com/nelsonelagunar/smart-home-ai-brain/issues/new?labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.md)

## 📋 Project Board

Track progress on our [Project Board](https://github.com/nelsonelagunar/smart-home-ai-brain/projects/1)

## 🤝 Good First Issues

New to contributing? Check out issues labeled `good first issue`:

[View Good First Issues](https://github.com/nelsonelagunar/smart-home-ai-brain/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22)
